3291270.name: Jink in
3291270.description:
Junk In offers players an engaging simulation experience as a homeless person, capturing the everyday challenges and survival situations faced on the streets. This casual simulator features level-based gameplay, with each level presenting a unique scenario for players to navigate and overcome.

Features:

  • Open World Exploration: Navigate a city filled with interactive environments, from busy streets to hidden corners.

  • Resource Scavenging: Collect scrap, discarded items, and rare finds.

  • Level-Based Progression: Unlock new levels, each offering fresh challenges and unique survival skills to master.

Will you survive another day?
3291270.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
